channel.title: Go Humble! RSS Books
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle books bundles!

item.title: The Free League RPG Collection
item.description: Fresh TTRPGs by Free League Publishing
item.content:encoded:
Ready to spice up your TTRPG collection with the hottest titles from Free League Publishing? Unlock the core set for Dragonbane, an exhilarating classic fantasy game full of magic, mystery, and adventure that offers “mirth and mayhem roleplaying,” aka hearty laughs and brutal challenges. Or brave Mutant: Year Zero, a post-apocalyptic tale of humanity’s crawl back from streets turned graveyards as godlike mutants roam the wasteland. Try these or Vaesen: A Wicked Secret, all for a price you choose, and help support Direct Relief with your purchase.

Codes are redeemable through the DriveThruRPG website.

item.title: The Ultimate Linux & SysAdmin Bundle
item.content:encoded: Learn the skills and gain the knowledge you need to succeed in system administration and development operations for Linux with this bundle of insightful courses by Packt. Inside this amazing curriculum, you’ll get expert insights on mastering AI networking, Windows 365, PowerShell scripting, and more. Deepen your understanding of SysAdmin and DevOps whether you’re a novice or a seasoned professional with courses like The Ultimate Linux Shell Scripting Guide, Microsoft Intune Cookbook - 2E and help support the Prevent Cancer Foundation with your purchase!

item.title: Data Visualization & Storytelling by Wiley
item.content:encoded: Show—don’t tell—when you integrate storytelling into your data to help paint a broader picture. Unlock eBooks from leading authors in the space, like the For Dummies team, and awesome titles like Cool Infographics: Effective Communication with Data Visualization and Design, Data Points: Visualization That Means Something, and Data-Driven Security: Analysis, Visualization and Dashboards. Pay what you want for a powerful collection of data visualization and storytelling eBooks from some of the biggest names in tech, and help support the Electronic Frontier Foundation!

item.title: Lost Lands Adventure for 5th Edition by Frog God Games
item.description: Can you survive the Lost Lands?
item.content:encoded: Can you survive the Lost Lands? Gather your friends and roll the dice, because it’s time to journey into the Lost Lands! We’ve teamed up with Frog God Games for this massive TTRPG bundle chock-full of resources to plan your next campaign. Explore the winding streets of Bard’s Gate, a citadel of artisans and politicians whose people are menaced by dark forces within and without. Use the Tome of Artifacts to scatter magical weapons and relics throughout the land for your players to find. Find a starting point for your adventure with expanded description manuals like Rappan Athuk: Adventures in Zelkor’s Ferry. You can even score a physical copy of The World of the Lost Lands, the definitive guide to the entire setting, full of information on its locations, peoples, and historical data! Endless adventure awaits you in this bundle of nearly 80 TTRPG ebooks, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support Doctors Without Borders with your purchase!

item.title: Programming with AI and GPT Prompts by Mammoth
item.content:encoded:
Learn how to work smarter, not harder with the all-new Programming with AI and GPT Prompts Bundle! Feed your digital curiosity about AI and GPT with professional-led courses like 101 OpenClaw Prompts - Automate with AI, 101 AI Agent Skills - Automate with OpenClaw, 101 Claude Design Projects - Automate with AI Prompts, and more! Additional courses within this amazing bundle will help you better understand AI so you can leverage new opportunities to create efficiencies and even save money! Pay what you want for the very best from Mammoth Club and help support Make-A-Wish with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 11th, 2027

item.title: The Rust Systems Programming Bundle
item.content:encoded: Rust has quickly become one of the most important languages for developers who want to build fast, safe, and reliable software without giving up performance. That’s why we’ve put together this practical Rust bundle, packed with hands-on ebooks from Packt to help you learn the language from the ground up and apply it to real-world projects. Across this bundle, you’ll explore Rust fundamentals, async programming, concurrency, web development, systems programming, C++ and Python integration, WebAssembly, blockchain, and performance-critical development. Whether you’re new to Rust or ready to go deeper, this bundle will help you build production-grade software with confidence. Grab it while you can and support Cancer Research UK with your purchase at the price of your choice!

item.title: Hot Mess Express: A Big Bundle of Misfit Heroes & Hilarious Hijinks by Image Comics
item.content:encoded:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Lose yourself in a library of fantastic graphic fiction in The Hot Mess Express Bundle by Image Comics! Read creative graphic novels like Snotgirl Vol. 1: Green Hair Don’t Care, the coming-of-age story of Lottie Person, a chic yet insecure fashionista with a mysterious snot condition; I Hate Fairyland Deluxe Vol. 1-3, a mischievously magical dark adventure akin to Alice in Wonderland; and Dead Eyes Vol. 1, the origin story of Martin Dobbs, a former masked criminal forced back into a life of crime to pay his wife’s medical bills. Get 40+ comics and graphic novels, and help support The BINC Foundation with your purchase!

item.title: The Ultimate Functional Programming by Pragmatic Programmers
item.content:encoded: Start creating with a function-focused mindset with the all-new Functional Programming Bundle by Pragmatic Programmers. Learn to execute a variety of functions to save time and energy for yourself, a business, or a new programming hobby. Unlock cornerstone eBooks like Domain Modeling Made Functional, Programming Clojure Fourth Edition, From Objects to Functions, and more. Get practical resources for novice coders and seasoned pros, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

item.title: Infinite Dread: Horror Comics by Oni Press
item.content:encoded: Superheroes are all well and good, but oftentimes horror is where comics really shine. To bring you the spookiest stories the medium has to offer, we’ve teamed up with Oni Press for a selection of comics that are sure to keep you up at night! Something horrifically weird is going on and no one will talk about it in Hobtown Mystery Stories. A startling new experiment in comic book storytelling inspired by firsthand accounts of real paranormal encounters awaits in High Strangeness. And you're only alive if you're online in Cemetery Kids Don't Die. There’s even more to explore in this ghoulish library of haunts, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support BINC with your purchase!

item.title: The Claude Code Mastery Bundle by Zenva
item.content:encoded: Develop software faster and learn the AI workflows modern developers are rapidly adopting with The Claude Code Mastery Bundle. Build full-stack AI apps with Next.js and Python, integrate Stripe subscriptions and modern LLM APIs, automate workflows with MCP and GitHub, and learn how to run fully private local AI systems with Ollama and OpenCode—all in one amazing bundle! Pay what you want for a masterclass collection from Zenva and support Alzheimer’s Research UK while building skills that can immediately improve how you develop software.

item.title: The Best of Robert Silverberg by Open Road Media
item.content:encoded: Feel like you’ve read all the new sci-fi and fantasy books and looking for something a little more classic? We’ve got a bundle full of the best novels and stories by celebrated author Robert Silverberg! Dive into his Majipoor Cycle with Lord Valentine’s Castle, following an amnesiac juggler who finds out he’s the heir to an entire planet, or start with the prequel trilogy launched by Sorcerers of Majipoor, and learn how the throne became so contested in the first place. Meet the new inheritors of the Earth in At Winter’s End, a tribe of humanoids who emerge from their hibernation after an apocalypse. Or keep things short and sweet with the novella Nightwings, set on an unfamiliar Earth facing alien invasion. There are many more worlds, futures, and adventures to explore in this ebook bundle of Silverberg’s work, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support the ALA’s Freedom to Read Foundation with your purchase!

item.title: Build it with LEGO by No Starch
item.content:encoded: One of our most popular bundles ever is back for a limited time—pay what you want for the Build it With LEGO Bundle by No Starch. Uncover the rich history of the legendary Danish juggernaut with more than 1 trillion bricks sold! Start your epic read-a-thon with the hottest LEGO titles around like The Art of the Brick, The Cult of LEGO, The LEGO Architect, and The LEGO Animation Book. Take your love for LEGO to the next level and help support It Gets Better with your purchase!

item.title: Kana Manga Mini Bundle: the Sequel! by Abrams
item.content:encoded: Discover the gripping, emotional, and magical tales in the pages of these series from manga publisher Kana! Follow the coming-of-age story of two school kids who find love and acceptance despite their trauma in Scars. Embark on a journey across a post-apocalyptic frozen landscape in the folklore-inspired series Silence. Jump into the action-packed boxing drama of two brothers who discover a mysterious, supernatural power in Space Punch. This bundle includes the complete volumes of all three series in digital form, so grab it now at the price of your choosing and support BINC with your purchase!

item.title: The Ultimate Biohacking & High-Performance Lifestyle Bundle
item.content:encoded: Looking for new ways to get healthier this summer? Take control of your habits with biohacking—the art of making lifestyle changes that improve your health, performance, and longevity—with this high-performance bundle from the teaching experts at Wiley. Forge your own path to better health with meaningful eBooks like Stress Management For Dummies, Biochemistry For Dummies, and more. Don’t be a dummy—unlock these helpful eBooks today and help support the Movember Foundation with your purchase.

item.title: Head First by O'Reilly
item.content:encoded: Prepare for your big coding exam with confidence with our curated bundle of learning courses on C#, Python, and beyond! O’Reilly’s brain-friendly approach to the award-winning Head First series is designed to make complex topics more approachable to newbies and beginners alike. Learn from experts within the topics of courses like Head First JavaScript Programming, Head First Software Architecture, Head First Python, and more. Rethink the way you approach knowledge growth and studying with a little help from O’Reilly, and help support Code for America with your purchase!

item.title: Mercedes Lackey: Valdemar and Beyond by DAW Books
item.description: Explore the worlds of a fantasy legend
item.content:encoded: If you’re a fantasy fan, you’ve probably heard of Mercedes Lackey, one of the most prolific and influential voices in the sci-fi/fantasy arena. If you’ve always meant to pick up one of her books but never got around to it, or if you’ve read a little of her work and are dying for more, we’ve got an ebook bundle full to the brim of Lackey’s biggest and best, from her bestselling Valdemar saga and beyond! Dive into the Kingdom of Valdemar with the first entry in the series, the magical adventure Arrows of the Queen. Reawaken the lost magic of the land in Winds of Fate. Solve the mystery of a young mage-in-training’s secret past in the dark academia adventure Intrigues. There are 37 books in total to explore in this bundle, so get it now for the price of your choice, and ALA’s Freedom to Read Foundation with your purchase!
